violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop was stored in the bun with handle in contact with the ice. Scoops should be stored with handle out of the products being served.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Thermometer was not provided in home-style refrigerator. Thermometers should be provided in all refrigerated units.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Test strips were not available during inspection. Strips should be available to check strength of sanitizing solutions.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. Unisex restrooms do not have covered waste receptacles. Restrooms used by women should have covered waste receptacle.--Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Unisex restrooms do not have self closing doors. Restroom doors should be self-closing.
